DATE:  March 12, 2025
TO:
  Honorable Mayor and City Councilmembers
FROM: Financial Services Department
TITLE: FY 2024-25 SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT
RECOMMENDATION
Staff submits the second quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City Council
accept the report and approve the budget adjustments.
BACKGROUND AND ANALYSIS
The City Council adopted the FY 2024-25 budgets on June 5, 2024. The approved General Fund
includes $216.28 million in revenues, with recurring expenditures totaling $215.45 million and an
additional $3.26 million allocated for one-time costs, bringing the total General Fund budget to
